feedback.details: Diagram passes mmdc validation (exit code 0) with zero warnings. Round 1 duplicate element definitions (c1-context.md:33-34) have been resolved by moving consul/vault inside Boundary containers.

All 8 required components present: Developer/Operations (lines 9-10), Nomad/Consul/Vault (lines 11,30-31), Qwen 7B GGUF/Nemotron-3-22B (lines 12-13), Frontier API (line 35), Orchestrator Model (1B)/Statistical Routing (lines 14-15), and llm-switch System boundary (line 16).

Word count 321 (within 270-330 range), passive voice minimal (<15%), but narrative completely fails to explicitly reference 'PRD Section 4.2 User Journeys' as required. Lines 3, 42-53, and 56-70 describe user actions without citing PRD 4.2. Line 69 references 4.2.1-4.2.3 but this is in the matrix footnote, not the narrative prose.

Table (c1-context.md:56-67) maps all components to PRD sections and explicitly links User Journey steps 4.2.1-4.2.3 (line 69), but violates format requirement 'Section X.Y, Page Z' by omitting page numbers. Entries show '3.1', '4.2.1' instead of 'Section 3.1, Page 12' format.

All 10 labels comply with ≥25 char requirement (lines 18-27: 54-99 chars), follow 'Protocol: Source performs Action on Destination' format, and include latency bounds (<10ms to <2s). No generic 'uses' or 'connects to' labels present.

All required versions present: Go 1.21+ (line 16), Docker 24.0+ (line 16), Nomad 1.7.0+ (line 11), Consul 1.16.0+ (line 30), Vault 1.15.0+ (line 31). Internal systems Orchestrator Model (1B) v1.0 and Statistical Routing v1.0 (lines 14-15) correctly labeled as <<System>> containers using System() syntax.

Dashed fallback lines present (lines 26,27 with $textStyle="dashed") and latency annotations included. However, labels fail to match required text: (a) Line 26 uses 'HTTPS: llm-switch performs failover routing to frontier API on local model unavailability or latency >100ms' instead of required 'Failover on latency >100ms'; (b) Line 27 uses 'HTTPS: Vault sends token expiry notification triggering auto-refresh in llm-switch' instead of required '401 → Token Refresh'.

Trusted Zone boundary (c1-context.md:29) correctly draws dashed line around Consul (line 30) and Vault (line 31) with annotation 'mTLS Required'. Public Internet boundary (line 34) uses solid line with 'TLS 1.3 Termination' annotation containing only frontierAPI (line 35). No internal services (orchestrator/statRouting) exposed to Public Internet.

Narrative (line 3) includes 'Prometheus metrics endpoint /metrics', 'Grafana dashboard ID llm-switch-overview', and 'memory-priority' routing strategy. However, missing explicit reference to 'supplementary context Section 3.1' for the memory-priority strategy. References 'GPU node affinity' but contract requires 'Kubernetes Node Affinity constraints' wording.

overall_summary: Architecture passes mermaid validation and C4 component completeness from Round 1, but fails 4 of 9 criteria below threshold. Critical gaps: (1) Narrative prose completely omits explicit 'PRD Section 4.2 User Journeys' reference (only appears in matrix footnote, not narrative); (2) Edge Case labels deviate from required text 'Failover on latency >100ms' and '401 → Token Refresh' by using protocol-format descriptions instead; (3) PRD Traceability Matrix omits page numbers violating 'Section X.Y, Page Z' format; (4) Cluster Environment references memory-priority routing without citing Section 3.1. The file shows improvement from Round 1's critical syntax errors but fails sprint contract due to semantic compliance gaps in narrative, matrix format, and label specificity.
